name: Toxic Blood
description:
Your blood flows with tetrodotoxin or a similar toxin, poisoning enemies who dare to bite you.

Creatures that damage you with an attack using their mouths (such as a jaws or fang Strike) must attempt a saving throw.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is Sickened 1.

Failure The creature takes ] damage and is sickened 1.

Critical Failure The creature takes ] damage and is Sickened 2.
